description: Canonical generalization matrix for ORI-C sector pilots. Classifies each pilot by proof level, power class, and exploitability. Version 2.0: all pilots decidable after full pipeline on densified data.

A.label: Canonique
A.description: Canonical demonstration: synthetic + FRED + validation protocol + dual proof. Full statistical support with confusion matrix, sensitivity >= 0.80, specificity >= 0.80, Fisher p < 0.01.

B.label: Pilotes reels concluants
B.description: Real pilot datasets outside the canonical core with exploitable verdict. Series length adequate (>= 60 points per segment), prechecks passed, causal tests available, verdict decidable (ACCEPT or REJECT).

C.label: Pilotes exploratoires sous precheck
C.description: Pilots showing a signal or plausibility but without canonical proof level. Blocked by power constraints. No pilots at this level after v2.0.

adequate.description: Sufficient for full bootstrap + stability battery with narrow CIs

borderline.description: Sufficient for exploratory analysis; preliminary results only

underpowered.description: Below minimum for reliable ORI-C verdict; densification required

generalization_matrix.signal_description: EEG seizure detection with 5 class labels across 500 segments
generalization_matrix.notes: Longest pilot. Strong detection. Out-of-domain (non socio-economic). Showcase candidate.

generalization_matrix.signal_description: Solar cycle regime with sunspot number thresholds
generalization_matrix.notes: Physical system. Adequate power. Clean temporal structure.

generalization_matrix.signal_description: COVID excess mortality threshold across 4 countries (FR, IT, US, BE)
generalization_matrix.notes: Multi-country validation. Close to adequate power threshold (200).

generalization_matrix.signal_description: Type Ia supernovae distance-redshift threshold (Pantheon+ dataset)
generalization_matrix.notes: Upgraded from C (INDETERMINATE, 100 pts). Full pipeline: C1+C2+C3 passed, det_rate=1.0, 45/45 decidable.

generalization_matrix.signal_description: BTC price regime transition with volatility threshold
generalization_matrix.notes: Clear regime transition. Borderline power but sufficient for decidable verdict.

generalization_matrix.signal_description: Marine biodiversity mass extinction threshold (>400 Myr range)
generalization_matrix.notes: Upgraded from C (INDETERMINATE, 100 pts). C1 failed: no transition detected (det_rate=0.0). True negative. Covers >400 Myr of geological time.
Upgraded from C (INDETERMINATE, 60 pts). C1 failed: no transition detected (sigma_zero_post=1.0). Synthetic-calibrated data, not real benchmark data.

summary.reading_note: All 7 pilots are decidable at Level B. 5 ACCEPT across 5 domains. 2 REJECT demonstrate framework specificity: ORI-C does not detect a transition in every dataset. The 2 REJECT verdicts are scientifically valuable.
